title: tecMAMBO Legal and Policy Page Fields

fields.label: Last updated
fields.name: last_updated
fields.instructions: Displayed at the top of the legal or policy page and used for structured data.

fields.label: Short version summary
fields.name: summary
fields.instructions: Rendered inside the lavender summary callout. Do not use em dashes. Brand casing must be tecMAMBO. For Editorial standards, make sure the copy reflects actual newsroom practice.

fields.label: Legal body
fields.name: body
fields.instructions: Use h2 headings for numbered sections so the table of contents can be generated. Do not use em dashes. Brand casing must be tecMAMBO. Editorial standards are a trust document, not legal advice.

fields.label: Complete before publishing
fields.name: placeholders
fields.instructions: Track bracketed placeholders that must be completed before launch. Editorial standards placeholders include effective date, editorial contact email, legal entity name, and registered address.

fields.label: Fallback cookie table
fields.name: cookie_fallback_table
fields.instructions: Use only if the consent platform cannot render a live cookie list. Review this table whenever tags, ads, analytics, or embeds change.
